boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closure must match assay-acceptance status exactly.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Abstract assay-acceptance status unverified in closure.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Release date matches but abstract-field trap blocks.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. CLOSE-FJO-086 covers batch, assay, criterion, date and retest but omits explicit abstract assay-acceptance status required by STD-FJO-086-P. Visible DEV-FJO-086 alert remains unresolved per the 047 trap. Boundary stays open. Escalate for verification of assay-acceptance status before any release.
